steps.title: Expand both sides
steps.content:
Distribute on each side of the equation.
$$3(2x-8)-13=6x-24-13=6x-37$$
$$4(x-4)+8=4x-16+8=4x-8$$
So the equation becomes $6x-37=4x-8$.

steps.title: Solve for the target
steps.content: Solve for $x$, then subtract $4$. $$6x-37=4x-8$$ $$2x=29$$ $$x=\frac{29}{2}$$ $$x-4=\frac{29}{2}-\frac{8}{2}$$ $$x-4=\frac{21}{2}$$ The answer is B.
